title: Backend Developer
description: Mid Yazılım Geliştirici 2–4 yıl deneyimli yazılım geliştiriciler için Quanticst Teknoloji olarak büyüyen ekibimize deneyimli bir yazılım geliştirici arıyoruz. Gerçek ve ölçeklenebilir projelerde söz sahibi olmak, modern teknolojilerle çalışmak ve kariyer yolculuğunda bir adım öteye geçmek istiyorsan bu pozisyon tam sana göre! Biz Kimiz? .NET Core & React.js ile kurumsal ölçekte uygulamalar geliştiriyoruz React Native ile çapraz platform mobil çözümler üretiyoruz Kubernetes & DevOps altyapısıyla sağlam ve ölçeklenebilir sistemler yönetiyoruz Teknik kararların birlikte alındığı, düz hiyerarşili ve hızlı büyüyen bir ekibiz Aranan Nitelikler C# / .NET Core 2+ yıl deneyim React.jsBileşen mimarisi & state yönetimi RESTful APITasarım & entegrasyon deneyimi Git & CI/CDVersiyon kontrol & pipeline yönetimi VeritabanıSQL & ORM kullanımı Takım çalışmasıAgile / Scrum ortamında çalışma deneyimi

title: Senior PHP Developer
description: About Us ideasoft is a technology company that will increase the competitiveness of companies of all sizes in the process of realizing their business goals, create added value, and produce quality, advanced projects and solutions. ideasoft has been growing rapidly since 2005 and offers web-based software, design and desktop software solutions to more than +45000 businesses in the field of E-Commerce We are looking for a skilled, motivated Software Developer to work in our office located in Dudullu-Ümraniye Büdotek. If you're a passionate software professional, a self-starter, a good problem solver and have a history of success in challenging and fast-paced environments, you could be the ideal candidate for this position. Required Skills, Knowledge and Experience BS degree in Software/Computer Engineering or significant relevant experience. Proven track record of a minimum 5 years experience of software development, including senior experience 3+ years experience in one or more modern PHP frameworks (Symfony, Laravel, Phalcon etc.) Experience with scalable and distributed SaaS systems Solid understanding of OOP concepts and software design patterns. Strong PHP programming expertise. Experience with multi-threading and memory management. Solid RDBMS knowledge like MySQL, PostgreSQL, Oracle, etc. Experience NoSQL databases like MongoDB, Redis, CouchBase etc. Experience with message queues like Kafka, RabbitMQ, etc. Experience working in an agile development environment. Experience version control systems like Git etc. Comfort with UNIX/Linux environments. An analytical mind to grasp concepts and solve problems quickly. Excellent communication and collaboration skills. No military obligation for male candidates. Nice To Have Strong knowledge of architectural patterns like Modular Monolith, Microservice, SOA, Event-driven and CQRS Experience in Payment Systems Experience with Jira / Confluence project management tools Responsibilities Participate in the design and development phase of software production Perform code reviews to drive teams to the highest standards for backend development Preparing the relevant unit tests for the test scenarios of the applications To participate and contribute to technical and architectural discussions Mentoring junior developers What We Offer? The E-senlik Wellbeing Program we have prepared for employees Birthday leave Women's Day leave to women employees Full Health Benefits Meal Allowance Transportation allowance Unlimited snacks in the office

title: PHP Web Developer | Remote
description: Position: PHP Developer Type: Hourly contract Compensation: $50–$120/hour Location: Remote Commitment: 10–40 hours/week Role Responsibilities Develop, test, and maintain scalable PHP-based web applications. Collaborate with cross-functional teams to define requirements and architecture. Write clean, maintainable, and efficient code following best practices. Perform code reviews, debugging, and performance optimization. Integrate third-party APIs and web services. Contribute to technical documentation and knowledge sharing. Continuously improve solutions based on evolving project needs. Requirements Strong experience in PHP development within professional environments. Solid expertise in web technologies including HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and databases. Experience building and maintaining scalable web applications. Strong understanding of OOP, MVC frameworks, and RESTful APIs. Proficiency with version control systems such as Git. Excellent written and verbal communication skills. Strong problem-solving skills and attention to detail. Application Process (Takes 20 Min) Easy Apply on LinkedIn Check email for next steps Participate in resume evaluation & interview stage

title: Full Stack Developer
description: We are looking for a highly skilled and experienced "Full Stack Developer" The job is primarily remote but we expect the candidates to be in Istanbul. Join us if you have a penchant to develop solutions with cutting-edge applications for a better world. What Are The Required Qualifications? Bachelor's degree in Computer Engineering or related fields 5+ years of professional software development experience Deep understanding and demonstrated experience in .Net Framework and C# libraries Angular knowledge is required. Expert in .Net Technologies (MVC, Web Forms) and C# language Experience in RESTful & SOAP service technologies Knowledge of object-oriented programming Experience in relational databases, ability to write functions Capable of writing unit tests Deep understanding of Microservices Technologies Experience in RabbitMQ, ElasticSearch, Redis, Docker Experience in Banking is a plus For details: Visit: www.innovance.com.tr Follow us on LinkedIn: www.linkedin.com/company/innovance-consultancy Follow us on Instagram: www.instagram.com/innovanceconsultancy Follow us on Medium: www.medium.com/innovance-company-blog Follow us on X: www.twitter.com/Innovance2017 Follow us on Threads: www.threads.net/@innovanceconsultancy

title: Backend Developer Stajyeri -Uzun Dönem
description: 🌍 Haratres Teknoloji , yenilikçi bakış açısı ile e-ticaret yazımı danışmanlığı alanında kurumsa markaların dijital dönüşüm yolculuklarına rehberlik eden, hızla büyüyen bir teknoloji şirketidir. 🎯 Misyonumuz; çözüm odaklı yaklaşımla, e-ticaret platformlarını doğru yönetebilmek için gerekli desteği vererek, müşterilerimizin güven duydukları iş ortağı olmaktır. 🚀 Backend Developer Staj Programı , Haratres Teknoloji bünyesinde; backend alanında , e-ticaret süreç yönetimi ve dijital dönüşüm alanlarında kendini geliştirmek isteyen genç yetenekler için tasarlanmış özel bir gelişim programıdır. 🎯 Seni Neler Bekliyor? • Gerçek proje deneyimi ile backend teknolojilerini öğrenme • Sana özel eğitim ve gelişim içerikleri • Deneyimli ekiplerle birebir mentorluk • Agile (Çevik) çalışma metodolojisi ile çalışma fırsatı • SAP ve e-ticaret teknolojilerinde danışman olarak gelişme fırsatı 🎯 Bu Programda Neler Kazanacaksın? • SAP Dünyasında yazım teknolojilerini deneyimleme • Büyük markaların e-ticaret teknolojilerinde deneyim kazanma fırsatı • E-ticaret bakış açısı ve problem çözme yetkinliği • Analitik düşünme ve süreç iyileştirme kabiliyeti • Gerçek iş senaryoları üzerinden deneyim kazanma fırsatı 📌 Başvuru ve Katılım Şartları • Üniversitelerin Bilgisayar Mühendisliği ve Yazımı Mühendisliği bölümlerinde 4. sınıfta öğrenciysen veya yeni mezunsan • Haftanın 5 günü staja katılabileceksen • İngilizceyi akıcı konuşabiliyorsan • Staj programı süresince Istanbul da bulunabiliyorsan • Java ve Springboot yazılım dillerinde bilgi sahibi isen ve proje yaptı isen • E-ticaret teknolojilerine ve web teknolojilerine ilgi duyuyorsan • Analitik düşünme ve problem çözme becerilerine güveniyorsan • İletişim ve koordinasyon becerilerin güçlüyse • Kendini geliştirmeye açık ve öğrenmeye istekliysen 🧩 Değerlendirme Süreci • Başvuru Adımı • İK Mülakat • İngilizce Mülakat • Karakter Analiz Envanteri • Excel Vaka Analizi • Teknik Mülakat -Vaka Sunumu-İngilizce • Teklif & Staj Alım Üç ay süren staj programının sonunda başarılı performans gösteren adaylar, kontenjan dahilinde değerlendirilerek iş teklifi alma fırsatı elde eder. 📩 Başvuru: CV’ni bizimle paylaşarak bu yolculuğa ilk adımı atabilirsin. burcu.sen@haratres.com adresine mail iletebilirsiniz.

title: Junior Full Stack Developer
description: Silisia , yapay zeka entegrasyonlu SaaS projeleri, yenilikçi mobil çözümler ve dijital ekosistemler üzerine çalışan, 2026 vizyonuyla büyüyen bir teknoloji girişimidir. Biz, kodun ötesinde bir topluluk ve üretim kültürü inşa ediyoruz. Şimdi, bu yolculuğun ilk safhalarında mutfağa girip bizimle birlikte öğrenecek, üretecek ve portfolyosuna gerçek bir startup deneyimi eklemek isteyen Gönüllü Takım Arkadaşları arıyoruz. Rolün Tanımı Bu pozisyon; henüz kariyerinin başında olan, teorik bilgisini gerçek bir ürün üzerinde denemek isteyen ve bir startup'ın kuruluş aşamasındaki dinamiklere şahitlik etmeyi hedefleyen öğrenciler veya yeni mezunlar için tasarlanmıştır. Maddi bir karşılıktan ziyade; mentorluk, profesyonel gelişim ve güçlü bir referans kazanımı odaklıdır. Teknik Beklentiler (Öğrenmeye Açık Olman Yeterli) Full Stack Merakı: Hem kullanıcı arayüzü (Frontend) hem de sunucu mantığı (Backend) süreçlerinde sorumluluk almaya istekli olmak. Modern Teknolojiler: Web veya mobil framework'lerinden (Flutter, React, Node.js vb.) en az birinde temel seviyede bilgi sahibi olmak. Temiz Kod: Yazdığı kodun okunabilirliğine ve modern mimari kurallarına önem vermek (veya bunu öğrenmek istemek). Tasarım Vizyonu: Minimalist ve premium kullanıcı deneyimine (UI/UX) karşı ilgi duymak. Seni Neler Bekliyor? Uçtan Uca Üretim: Bir fikrin kod satırlarından yayındaki bir ürüne dönüşme sürecini bizzat deneyimleme. Mentorluk ve Network: Yazılım mimarisi, ürün yönetimi ve topluluk liderliği konularında doğrudan kurucu ekip ile çalışma ve "Dijital Garaj" gibi ekosistemlerde network edinme fırsatı. Esnek ve Samimi Çalışma: Tamamen remote (uzaktan), akademik takvimine ve kişisel programına saygı duyan bir çalışma düzeni. Referans ve Gelecek: Başarılı bir süreç sonunda Silisia adına güçlü bir referans mektubu ve ilerleyen aşamalarda çekirdek ekipte yer alma önceliği. Lokasyon: Remote (Uzaktan) Süre: Esnek / Proje Odaklı

title: Mid React Native Developer (Remote)
description: SHFT is a startup for fast-growing tech companies. We take the development load off your shoulders with scalable and dedicated in-house developers. Think of us as your strategic product partner that codes. We welcome enthusiastic startups and target-driven scale-ups; assist them with a thorough design, accompanied by a detailed MVP scope, followed by impeccable development, and finally a confident product launch. Now we are expanding the team and want to meet with new colleagues. There are a few details that we care about. Most important 3+ years of solid React Native experience, designing and developing mobile applications using React Native Hands-on experience with build tools like XCode and Android Studio Knowledge of up-to-date React features like React-hooks, Context Experience in publishing apps to App Store/ Play Store Build app and UI components from prototypes and wireframes Ability to build and improve a REST/JSON API client Ability to debug API responses Write high-performance, reusable code for UI components Collaborate with back-end and API developers to enhance the user experience Plan feature implementations by working closely with the product team Participate in code reviews and provide constructive feedback to improve code quality Keep up-to-date with emerging trends and technologies in mobile development Nice to have Experience working remotely Experience with iOS native modules Experience with Android native modules Experience with type-checking solutions (e.g. TypeScript) Experience with fastlane Experience with continuous integration and deployment (CI/CD) environment Experience with git branching, merging, and deployments Experience with Firebase Desired Skills Engineer by mindset and always try to understand how things work under the hood, Love to learn through doing. Ready to put in some hard work to expand your skills, Self-motivated and self-disciplined and thus work well in a flat hierarchy with lots of freedom, Love to have creative freedom, make independent judgments, and live up to the responsibility that comes with that freedom What We Offer Benefits: Meal card & commute compensation, paid birthday off, working equipment Happier Weekdays: We offer flexible working hours including a remote working option Never Stop Learning: We provide you the opportunity to reach the leading online e-learning platforms like Udemy & libraries Open Culture: We offer a flat organization, direct & open communication culture. We are young, energetic and we work in a relaxing environment

title: Senior Fullstack Developer (Java & React)
description: Fintech alanında faaliyet gösteren iş ortağımız için; Java 17+, Spring Boot ve Spring Framework ekosisteminde uzmanlaşmış, aynı zamanda React ile modern frontend geliştirme deneyimine sahip Senior Full Stack Developer arayışımız bulunmaktadır. Aranan Nitelikler: Üniversitelerin mühendislik bölümlerinden mezun En az 7 yıl yazılım geliştirme deneyimi Java (17+) ve Spring Boot/Spring Framework ekosisteminde ileri seviye bilgi React ile modern frontend geliştirme deneyimi (component-based mimari, state management) Git (GitFlow, trunk-based) ve code review süreçlerine hakim DDD / EDD yaklaşımları ile mikroservis geliştirme deneyimi SOLID prensipleri ve design pattern bilgisi Docker & Kubernetes deneyimi Apache Kafka, Redis ve Keycloak ile çalışma deneyimi Veritabanı tasarımı ve performans optimizasyonu konusunda yetkinlik Fintech domain bilgisi PayFac süreçleri (merchant onboarding, reconciliation, settlement, payout) hakkında deneyim Sanal POS, 3D / non-3D ödeme sistemleri bilgisi Banka, acquirer ve APM entegrasyon deneyimi Cross-border payment ve multi-currency sistem tecrübesi PCI DSS süreçlerinde deneyim Payment gateway, orchestration ve multi-acquirer routing bilgisi High throughput & low latency sistem geliştirme deneyimi Retry management ve circuit breaker pattern bilgisi Sorumluluklar: Backend ve frontend katmanlarında uçtan uca geliştirme yapmak Ölçeklenebilir ve yüksek performanslı mikroservis mimarileri tasarlamak Modern ve kullanıcı dostu arayüzler geliştirmek Kod kalitesi, performans ve güvenlik standartlarını uygulamak Sistem mimarisi kararlarında aktif rol almak ve teknik yönlendirme sağlamak Takım içinde best practice’leri yaygınlaştırmak Mevcut sistemlerde iyileştirme ve refactoring süreçlerine liderlik etmek High-level system design, scalability ve resiliency konularında mentorluk sağlamak “AVD Danışmanlık, Türkiye İş Kurumu’nun 1225 numaralı izin belgesi ile faaliyet göstermektedir.”

Lokasyon: Remote (Uzaktan) Süre: Esnek / Proje Odaklı

title: Full Stack Developer
description: Who are we? Fizix is an end-to-end smart machine health monitoring solution, designed to keep rising maintenance and energy costs under control. In line with Industry 4.0 and digitalisation trends, it enables monitoring, tracking, remote measurement and much earlier detection of potential failures for smart factory and smart city projects. The health of all systems, large and small, can be monitored at every stage of production, with a particular focus on rotating equipment such as motors, compressors, fans and pumps. This ensures early fault detection, improved operational and personal safety, increased production, reduced downtime, improved end product quality and many other benefits. What are we looking for? We are looking for a Full Stack .NET Software Developer to join our development team at Fizix AI. You will actively contribute to developing and maintaining software modules running on both cloud and on-premises environments using modern web technologies. In this role, you will work on both backend (.NET 9, C#) and frontend (Blazor, HTML, JavaScript) layers while leveraging AI-assisted coding tools to accelerate development processes. Your responsibilities: Develop new modules and maintain/optimize existing ones Implement performance-, security-, and scalability-oriented solutions Analyze requirements and transform them into technical designs Participate in code reviews and maintain coding standards Utilize AI-powered development tools to enhance productivity Contribute to unit and integration testing processes Support DevOps and deployment workflows Analyze and resolve issues through root cause analysis Qualifications: Bachelor’s degree in Computer Engineering or Software Engineering At least 3 years of experience developing on the .NET platform Strong knowledge of C#, Blazor, HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and jQuery Experience in developing REST APIs • Solid SQL and optimization skills in PostgreSQL Experience with Dapper ORM or similar tools Familiarity with layered architecture, SOLID, and Clean Code principles Basic testing, debugging, and performance analysis skills Nice to have: Experience with Redis Cache or RabbitMQ Knowledge of WebSocket, SignalR, or MQTT Familiarity with OWASP, JWT/OAuth2, and IAM security concepts Experience with AI-assisted coding tools • Experience with unit/integration test frameworks What do we offer? A close-knit, innovative team where your ideas truly matter Opportunity to work with cutting-edge technologies on global projects A vibrant work environment in one of the country’s top technology hubs Monthly happy hours, good energy, and open communication Best-in-class lunches in our company cafeteria Join us and help shape the next generation of smart machine technology!

title: Full Stack Engineer
description: Full Stack Developer Şirket: SeaSoft Yazılım & Teknoloji Konum: Kayseri (Ofis / Hibrit) Hakkımızda SeaSoft olarak geliştirdiğimiz Binora Akıllı Yönetim Sistemi, bina ve site yönetimini dijitalleştiren bir SaaS platformudur. Aktif olarak geliştirilmekte olan bu ürünün teknik süreçlerinde görev alacak ekip arkadaşı arıyoruz. Pozisyon Tanımı Bu pozisyonda çalışacak kişi; •Binora yazılımının geliştirme süreçlerinde aktif rol alacaktır •Mevcut sistemde hata tespiti ve düzeltmeleri yapacaktır •Yeni özelliklerin geliştirilmesine katkı sağlayacaktır •Backend ve frontend süreçlerinde görev alacaktır •Sistem performansı ve genel yapı iyileştirmelerine destek olacaktır •Gerektiğinde kurumsal web sitesi projelerinde görev alacaktır Aranan Nitelikler Core teknolojiler: •	React (Vite) •	Tailwind CSS •	NestJS (TypeScript) •	TypeORM •	PostgreSQL Backend ve entegrasyon: •	REST API geliştirme ve kullanımı •	JWT / Passport.js •	bcrypt •	PayTR ve NetGSM API bilgisi (tercih sebebi) Araçlar ve altyapı: •	Git •	Docker (tercih sebebi) •	ESLint / Prettier Cloud: •AWS veya Azure hakkında temel bilgi (tercih sebebi) Mobil ve Ek Nitelikler (Tercih Sebebi) •React Native (tercihen Expo) •Mevcut API’leri mobil uygulamada kullanabilme •Firebase veya OneSignal ile push notification •App Store ve Google Play yayın süreçlerine aşinalık •UI/UX konusunda temel bilgi Aradığımız Profil •	Sorumluluk alabilen •	Problem çözme becerisi olan •	Takım çalışmasına uyumlu •	Kod kalitesine ve düzenine önem veren

title: Senior React Developer
description: About Contextic AI Contextic AI is building AI-powered, context-aware language tools that help users understand and communicate better across the web. Our products combine modern frontend engineering with practical AI workflows to deliver fast, intuitive user experiences. Role Overview We’re looking for a Senior React Developer to lead frontend architecture and build high-quality user experiences across our web app and browser extension surfaces. You’ll work closely with product, design, and AI/backend engineers to ship reliable features end-to-end. What You’ll Do Own and scale frontend architecture using React and TypeScript. Build complex UI features with strong focus on performance and usability. Develop and maintain browser extension interfaces and content-script integrations. Collaborate with backend/AI teams to integrate APIs and AI-driven functionality. Improve code quality through testing, code reviews, and engineering standards. Mentor other developers and drive best practices across the frontend team. Required Qualifications 5+ years of professional frontend experience, including 3+ years with React. Strong hands-on skills in React, TypeScript, JavaScript (ES6+), and modern CSS. Experience with state management patterns (Context, Redux, Zustand, or similar). Experience integrating REST/GraphQL APIs and handling async data flows. Solid understanding of performance optimization, accessibility, and responsive design. Proven experience shipping production-grade frontend systems. Nice to Have Experience building Chrome/browser extensions. Familiarity with Vite, Webpack, and frontend build tooling. Experience with automated testing (Jest, React Testing Library, Playwright/Cypress). Understanding of AI-enabled product workflows or prompt-driven UX. Experience in startup environments and fast iteration cycles. What Success Looks Like (First 90 Days) You’ve shipped meaningful frontend features used by real users. You’ve improved code structure and maintainability in key areas. You’ve introduced measurable improvements in UX performance and quality. You’re actively contributing to technical direction and mentoring peers. Why Join Contextic AI Work on a product with clear user impact and modern AI use cases. High ownership and influence on technical decisions. Small, focused team with fast shipping culture. Competitive compensation and flexible remote setup.

title: Senior Java Backend Developer (Hybrid)
description: Job Description 💻 Role Overview We are looking for a Senior Java Backend Developer to join our international team and contribute to the design, development, and optimization of scalable backend systems. 🔧 Key Responsibilities Develop and maintain backend applications using Java 17/21 & Spring Boot Design and implement microservice architectures Work with RabbitMQ/Kafka, Redis/Couchbase, and Oracle/PostgreSQL Contribute to system modernization and transformation projects Ensure high performance, scalability, and code quality Participate in CI/CD processes and use tools like SonarQube Make architectural decisions and optimize application performance 🎯 Requirements 7+ years of experience in Java backend development Strong knowledge of Spring Boot and microservices Experience with messaging systems (RabbitMQ/Kafka) Familiarity with databases (Oracle, PostgreSQL) and caching systems Experience in CI/CD pipelines and code quality practices Solid understanding of concurrency, transactions, and performance optimization Fluent in Turkish and English Strong analytical thinking and communication skills 🌟 Nice to Have Experience with Weblogic Background in mobile backend development Participation in digital transformation projects 👉 If you’re passionate about Java, microservices, and building scalable systems, we’d love to hear from you! Amaris Consulting is committed to promoting diversity within its workforce and to creating an inclusive work environment. We consider applications from all qualified individuals, regardless of gender, sexual orientation, race, ethnic origin, beliefs, age, marital status, disability, or any other characteristic. Special attention will be given to candidates with disabilities. Ç1 Who are we? Amaris Consulting is an independent technology consulting firm providing guidance and solutions to businesses. With more than 1,000 clients across the globe, we have been rolling out solutions in major projects for over a decade – this is made possible by an international team of 7,600 people spread across 5 continents and more than 60 countries. Our solutions focus on four different Business Lines: Information System & Digital, Telecom, Life Sciences and Engineering. We’re focused on building and nurturing a top talent community where all our team members can achieve their full potential. Amaris is your steppingstone to cross rivers of change, meet challenges and achieve all your projects with success. At Amaris, we strive to provide our candidates with the best possible recruitment experience. We like to get to know our candidates, challenge them, and be able to give them proper feedback as quickly as possible. Here's what our recruitment process looks like: Brief Call : Our process typically begins with a brief virtual/phone conversation to get to know you! The objective? Learn about you, understand your motivations, and make sure we have the right job for you! Interviews (the average number of interviews is 3 - the number may vary depending on the level of seniority required for the position). During the interviews, you will meet people from our team: your line manager of course, but also other people related to your future role. We will talk in depth about you, your experience, and skills, but also about the position and what will be expected of you. Of course, you will also get to know Amaris: our culture, our roots, our teams, and your career opportunities! Case study : Depending on the position, we may ask you to take a test. This could be a role play, a technical assessment, a problem-solving scenario, etc. As you know, every person is different and so is every role in a company. That is why we have to adapt accordingly, and the process may differ slightly at times. However, please know that we always put ourselves in the candidate's shoes to ensure they have the best possible experience. We look forward to meeting you!
